header.title: Verify Your Vote
header.subtitle: Confirm your voting record using the code sent to your email

main_card.title: Vote Verification
main_card.subtitle: Enter your verification code to view your vote

demo_success.title: Vote Successfully Submitted!

code_notice.heading: This is your Verification Code, not your Voting Code
code_notice.body: A unique verification code has been generated for you after your vote was successfully submitted. This code is different from the voting code you used to cast your vote. It exists solely so you can return to this page and confirm exactly which candidates you selected.
code_notice.tip: Copy and save this code now — it cannot be shown again after you leave this page.

demo_success.instructions_1: Save this code in a safe place
demo_success.instructions_2: Come back to this page and select "Demo / Testing"
demo_success.instructions_3: Paste the code to verify and view your vote

real_success.title: Thank you {name}, your vote has been successfully recorded!
real_success.description: Your vote has been securely recorded and encrypted. You will receive an email with a verification code that you can use to confirm your vote at any time.
real_success.security_notice: Your vote is protected and completely anonymous

real_election.instructions: Check your email for the verification code. Enter it below to view your submitted vote.
real_election.label: Verification Code
real_election.placeholder: Enter the code from your email (e.g., abc123def456_1)

demo_election.instructions: Enter the verification code you received after voting to view your test vote record.
demo_election.label: Voting Code

check_email.title: Check Your Email
check_email.description: Look in your inbox and spam folder for the verification code. The code was sent immediately after your vote was submitted.

contact_support.title: Contact Support
contact_support.description: If you have any issues or cannot find your verification code, please contact the election committee for assistance.

footer.security_message: Your vote is protected by encryption and remains completely anonymous

errors.wrong_verification_code: Sorry, the code you entered is incorrect. Please check your email and try again.
errors.not_voted_yet: Sorry, it seems you have not voted yet. Please vote first, then you can verify your vote.
